title: Language Teaching Application and Research Center - Placement Test
content:
Language Teaching Application and Research Center - Placement Test

Placement Exam

The Placement Exam is conducted at the end of the one-year language course to assess the four core language skills. Based on the score obtained by the student, their proficiency level is determined, and a level-appropriate certificate is prepared and issued by Istanbul Esenyurt University Language Teaching Application and Research Center.

Students are required to bring their passport as valid identification.

Students must register for the exam through Istanbul Esenyurt University Language Teaching Application and Research Center no later than one hour before the exam time.

The Placement Exam is subject to a fee.

Students are certified based on their performance in the exam.

Skill Assessment

Skill

Maximum Score

Listening

25

Reading

25

Speaking

25

Writing

25

Total

100

Score Distribution by Levels

The scoring is based on the framework determined by Council of Higher Education.

Level

Score Range

A1

20–49

A2

50–59

B1

60–69

B2

70–79

C1

80–89

C2
